text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No results after coming this far... How should we
judge this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Were the fundamentals of my hypothesis off the
mark? Or could it be...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Were the fundamentals of my hypothesis off the
mark? Or could it be...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come now... You're just stating the obvious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it more apt to suggest I rethink my
approach?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You should prepare yourself. Things are about to
get even busier!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We'll need to review the data we have before we
continue our research!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was merely thinking I need to come up with a
new hypothesis, you know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Being depressed does nothing for productivity. I
have no time for it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Everything is a source of encouragement. I'll show
you in the next race!
